**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the v5.7 spatial semantic and extremum probe (Dual-Veto Model) demotion strike. This enterprise is officially categorized under 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing' in the registry system, and its business license lists an extremely complex array of heavy manufacturing items: spanning from 'power quality testing and enhancement devices' and 'automobile charging piles' all the way to 'substation intelligent control equipment' and 'high/low voltage complete switchgears'. However, the physical and capital probes immediately pierced this false facade: the enterprise is registered at 'Room 211, Building 43, Headquarters Base' (a typical micro single room on the second floor of a commercial office building within an industrial park). Combined with the data characteristics of 4 million RMB paid-in capital and 7 insured employees, it is absolutely impossible to accommodate even a single high/low voltage switchgear assembly line or a substation equipment production workshop in a second-floor office room. This is a complete paradox in terms of physical load-bearing, fire safety approval, and spatial layout. The system has forcefully stripped away its false 'factory/manufacturing' shell, accurately characterizing it as: an Asset-Light Power Engineering Contractor & Equipment Proxy composed of 7 core personnel. Its core business model is: undertaking power engineering design and maintenance projects (e.g., designing power distribution/charging pile schemes for residential communities and industrial parks), and acting as an agent/middleman to procure and resell the necessary complete switchgear equipment and cable accessories, completely outsourcing the construction or manufacturing phases.
